intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 65%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 65% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 65%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder. 72% FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 72%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70:00 at 72%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 11% complete. 10 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 88% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 70min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
